ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_systems" (
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each public water system */,
  "pws_name" TEXT /* Name of the public water system */,
  "pws_type" TEXT /* Type of public water system (e.g., Community water system, Non-community water system) */,
  "primary_source" TEXT /* Primary source of the public water system (e.g., Ground water, Surface water) */,
  "counties_served" TEXT /* Counties served by the public water system */,
  "cities_served" TEXT /* Cities served by the public water system */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Population served by the public water system */,
  "num_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of facilities associated with the public water system */,
  "num_violations" INTEGER /* Number of violations associated with the public water system */,
  "num_site_visits" INTEGER /* Number of site visits associated with the public water system */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* The date the water system was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the water system (e.g., active, inactive, under review) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* The name of the primary contact for the water system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address of the primary contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the primary contact */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date of the next inspection */,
  "num_complaints" INTEGER /* The number of complaints received about the water system */,
  "compliance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the overall compliance of the water system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pws_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_pws_type FOREIGN KEY ("pws_type") REFERENCES pws_types ("pws_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_cities_served FOREIGN KEY ("cities_served") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_primary_source FOREIGN KEY ("primary_source") REFERENCES primary_sources ("primary_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_counties_served FOREIGN KEY ("counties_served") REFERENCES counties ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pws_types" (
  "pws_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public water system type */,
  "pws_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the public water system type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the public water system type */,
  "regulatory_requirements" TEXT /* A description of the regulatory requirements for the water system type */,
  "max_population" INTEGER /* The maximum population that the water system type can serve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pws_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_sources" (
  "primary_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary source */,
  "primary_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the primary source */,
  "water_quality_standards" TEXT /* A description of the water quality standards for the primary source */,
  "treatment_requirements" TEXT /* A description of the treatment requirements for the primary source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primary_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the county */,
  "num_water_systems" INTEGER /* The number of water systems in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the county in which the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the city */,
  "num_water_systems" INTEGER /* The number of water systems in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Public water system ID associated with the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., treatment plant, storage tank) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the facility (e.g., in gallons or liters) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the facility (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date of the next maintenance */,
  "num_inspections" INTEGER /* The number of inspections the facility has undergone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_pws_id FOREIGN KEY ("pws_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("pws_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Public water system ID associated with the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date of the violation */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of the violation (e.g., maximum contaminant level, monitoring and reporting) */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the violation */,
  "enforcement_action" TEXT /* The enforcement action taken (e.g., fine, warning, shutdown) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* The amount of the fine, if any */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date the violation was resolved */,
  "responsible_inspector" TEXT /* The name of the inspector responsible for the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_pws_id FOREIGN KEY ("pws_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("pws_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_visits" (
  "site_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site visit */,
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Public water system ID associated with the site visit */,
  "site_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the site visit */,
  "site_visit_type" TEXT /* Type of the site visit (e.g., routine inspection, complaint investigation) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the inspector who conducted the site visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the site visit */,
  "visit_outcome" TEXT /* The outcome of the site visit (e.g., no issues, issues found) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_visits_pws_id FOREIGN KEY ("pws_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("pws_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_visits_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Public water system ID associated with the permit */,
  "permit_date" TEXT /* Date of the permit */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of the permit (e.g., construction permit, operating permit) */,
  "permit_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the permit */,
  "permit_status" TEXT /* The current status of the permit (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "permit_conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or requirements associated with the permit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_pws_id FOREIGN KEY ("pws_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("pws_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, inspector, public water system owner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "water_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality data point */,
  "pws_id" TEXT /* Public water system ID associated with the water quality data */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the water quality parameter (e.g., total coliform, lead) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the water quality parameter */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the water quality parameter (e.g., mg/L, μg/L) */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date of the water quality sample */,
  "sampling_location" TEXT /* The location where the water sample was taken */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* The method used to sample the water */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the lab that analyzed the sample */,
  "lab_report_date" TEXT /* The date the lab report was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_pws_id FOREIGN KEY ("pws_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("pws_id")
)
